race.description: Don't Think, Just Nova Winter Cup Ms Pace (G3)
race.comment: BETTORS PRIDE (2) is fine form having come from wider barriers for fighting wins in his last two outings at this venue. This is stronger but he is well served by the low draw and his strike rate at this distance stands at 50 per cent. SWEET PINS NZ (3) drew on the back row and was held up for a clear run last week so forgive that result. Had come from wider barriers than this to win his previous two outings here so deserves another chance. NEVER ENDING (5) is an accomplished pacer who hasn't raced since the WA Cup seven months ago but he generally comes to hand very quickly with four wins and two placings from seven fresh appearances. Can run a big race to kick off this campaign. YOURE SO FINE NZ (12) may need some luck from the back row but deserves respect off last week's win.
